stateValue.description: The state value for the alarm

stateReason.description: An explanation for the alarm state

stateUpdatedTimestamp.description: The time stamp of the last update to the state

metricName.description: The name of the metric associated with the alarm

namespace.description: The namespace of the metric associated with the alarm

statistic.description: The statistic for the metric associated with the alarm

dimensions.description: The dimensions for the metric associated with the alarm

period.description: The period in seconds over which the statistic is applied

evaluationPeriods.description: The number of periods over which data is compared to the threshold

threshold.description: The value to compare with the specified statistic

comparisonOperator.description: The arithmetic operation to use when comparing the statistic and threshold

treatMissingData.description: How missing data points are treated

actionsEnabled.description: Whether actions are executed during alarm state changes

alarmActions.description: The actions to execute when the alarm transitions to ALARM state

okActions.description: The actions to execute when the alarm transitions to OK state

insufficientDataActions.description: The actions to execute when the alarm transitions to INSUFFICIENT_DATA state
